description: Fixed catalytic residues for the salutaridine reductase (SalR) motif-preserving redesign case study. Indices are 0-based; pass them via the --fix CLI flag of catif_rl.sampling.inpaint (these residues will be PRESERVED at their native identities, every other residue will be redesigned). Do NOT pass them as --design-indices, which would do the opposite. The legacy --mask flag is a deprecated alias of --fix.
functional_role: Catalytic / proton-transfer triad of the SalR active site.
reference: Geissler, R.; Brandt, W.; Ziegler, J. Molecular Modeling and Site-Directed Mutagenesis Reveal the Benzylisoquinoline Binding Site of the Short-Chain Dehydrogenase/Reductase Salutaridine Reductase. Plant Physiol. 143, 1493-1503 (2007). DOI: 10.1104/pp.106.095166
